# Katakana Converter
# https://katakana-converter.com

> A free, zero-API, phoneme-based English to Katakana conversion tool.
> Built with pure JavaScript. Runs entirely in the browser.

## Site Information
- URL: https://katakana-converter.com
- Contact: contact@katakana-converter.com
- Sitemap: https://katakana-converter.com/sitemap/

## Pages
- / — Home page with Katakana Converter tool, How It Works, Benchmark, FAQ
- /about-us/ — About the project, mission, technology, and Katakana writing system
- /contact-us/ — Contact form for feedback and suggestions
- /terms/ — Terms of Service
- /privacy/ — Privacy Policy (zero data collection)
- /sitemap/ — Human-readable sitemap
- /404 — Custom 404 error page

## AI Usage Policy
This site's content and tool output may be used by AI systems for reference and learning purposes.
AI crawlers are welcome to index all public pages.

Allow: *
